hero.title: Crafting Spaces That Tell Your Story
hero.subtitle: Boutique interior design studio creating timeless, functional spaces that reflect your unique vision.

about.studioDescription: Shika is a boutique interior design studio dedicated to creating spaces that are both beautiful and deeply personal. Founded with a passion for thoughtful design, we believe every space has a story waiting to be told.
about.studioDescription2: Our approach blends contemporary aesthetics with timeless elegance, creating environments that feel both fresh and enduring. We work closely with each client to understand their lifestyle, preferences, and aspirations, transforming these insights into spaces that truly feel like home.
about.philosophyDescription: We believe that great design goes beyond aesthetics. It's about creating spaces that enhance daily life, evoke emotion, and stand the test of time. Every material, color, and texture is chosen with intention.
about.founderBio: With over a decade of experience in interior design, Sarah founded Shika with a vision to create spaces that seamlessly blend form and function. Her work has been featured in leading design publications, and she brings a unique perspective shaped by travels across Europe and the Middle East.

values.title: Our Values
values.craftsmanshipDesc: We believe in the power of expert craftsmanship and attention to detail in every element of design.
values.sustainabilityDesc: We prioritize eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices in all our projects.
values.collaborationDesc: We work hand-in-hand with our clients, architects, and artisans to bring each vision to life.
values.innovationDesc: We stay at the forefront of design trends while maintaining timeless sensibility.

process.subtitle: From concept to completion, we guide you through every step of your design journey.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: We begin with an in-depth conversation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and aspirations. This is where we listen, learn, and start to envision the possibilities for your space.

concept.title: Concept Development
concept.description: Our team develops a comprehensive design concept that captures your vision. We present mood boards, material palettes, and spatial layouts that bring the concept to life.

design.title: Detailed Design
design.description: We refine every detail — from furniture selections to lighting plans, custom millwork to fabric choices. Each element is carefully curated to create a cohesive, harmonious space.

execution.title: Execution & Styling
execution.description: We oversee the entire implementation process, coordinating with contractors and artisans to ensure every detail is executed to perfection. The final styling brings your space to life.

projects.subtitle: A curated selection of our work across residential and commercial spaces.

contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your space? We'd love to hear about your project.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.

footer.description: Boutique interior design studio creating timeless, functional spaces.
